title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Reiju, Unknown person #2, Judge, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The truth hides behind his iron mask.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keeps carrying those fancy meals off to everyday.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We haven't even had any guests recently.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: our one and only job is to follow the king's orders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....maybe they're hiding some kind of VIP refugee in this castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm putting my money on it being the King's new mistress!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, have you heard that one of the guards heard some piercing shrieks coming from the dungeon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cut it out, all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such magnificent skills... calling these children super-humans doesn't do them justice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wahaha!! You make me proud, children!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I LOVE YOU ALL MORE THAN ANYTHING!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must leave at once! This is not a place a royal should be spending time in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My LORD, are you sure you wish to go there alone?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The medical ward is located quite a distance from here... on the outskirts of the castle grounds! And in this weather....

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Not a word to my father eith-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Y... you can't have this food!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you come all the way here alone?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's awfully sweet of you but... the queen can barely keep anything down so we must be selective about what she eats...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But hey, if this is appetizing enough then at the very lea-

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
